mapper.sql: id, name, description, price, stock, category_id, category, image_url, status, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, is_deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM products WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT updated_at FROM products WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO products (id, name, description, price, stock, category_id, category, image_url, status, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, is_deleted) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{categoryId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{category, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{imageUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status}, SYSTIMESTAMP, #{createdBy}, SYSTIMESTAMP, #{createdBy}, 0)
